title: 12 Angry Men
description: A dissenting juror in a murder trial slowly manages to convince the other eleven men, gathered in one room, to reconsider their guilty vote and question their own assumptions.

title: Inception
description: A thief who steals corporate secrets through dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea into a target's subconscious across nested dream worlds.

title: Fight Club
description: An insomniac office worker and a soap maker form an underground fight club that evolves into something much more, blurring the line between reality and identity.

title: Pulp Fiction
description: The lives of two mob hitmen, a boxer, a gangster and his wife intertwine in four tales of violence and redemption told out of chronological order.

title: Forrest Gump
description: A slow-witted but kind-hearted man from Alabama witnesses and unwittingly influences several defining historical events of the 20th century United States.

title: The Dark Knight
description: Batman faces the Joker, an anarchic criminal mastermind who plunges Gotham into chaos and forces the hero to confront the thin line between justice and vengeance.

title: Star Wars
description: A farm boy joins a band of rebels to rescue a princess and destroy a planet-killing space station, discovering an ancient mystical power along the way.

title: The Shawshank Redemption
description: A banker wrongly convicted of murder forms a lasting friendship in prison and quietly engineers his own redemption over two decades behind bars.
